string 2: Hm. So it was you who defeated my loyal subordinates...
I shall ask frankly. Who are you?
{next}Kunlun's envoy.
{next}I'm a human.
{next}I'm a Digimon.

I see. You are connected to the host? Then, all the more,
you are no ordinary human.

I hear humans that enter the Digimon world are special. You
must have special powers.

Is that some kind of human joke? Hmm. I do not find it to be
very elegant.

This is my master, Susanomon. You better not underestimate
its strength.

They were all defeated by this human. But no surprise there.
The opponent was too strong.
Well, let us proceed in our own way.

Seriously, you're so lucky. Susanomon's strength is... I
can't describe it in words.

The great hero of Shambala, Susanomon. You should feel
honored to fight him.

Let us cross swords, human child! I am Susanomon, the
warrior of Shambala.

We shall do battle in keeping with this arena's rules. I
shall be standing by, so challenge me when ready.

Hahaha! Very amusing, indeed! I never expected to meet such
a powerful human!
Th-This is unbelievable...! Susanomon has been... defeated!
Is this... a dream?

Great fight, Susanomon. You did well while adjusting to this
unfamiliar world.

It is certainly an unfamiliar world, but I shall not say
that is the reason for my loss.
This human is strong. It is as simple as that.

We are willing to listen to those who are strong. What is it
that you wish to tell us?
{next}Don't keep Kunlun waiting.
{next}Remember what your mission is.
{next}How many master's are gonna show up?

I have kept the host waiting too long. It is hard to leave
this place, but I must move on.

Our mission is to enjoy this world. Haha. Do not look so
worried. I was just teasing you.

Haha. Kotemon's master, Musyamon. Musyamon's master,
Zanbamon. And I, Zanbamon's master.

It must have surprised you to have so many masters
appearing, but I am the last.

We, too, came to this world to help, though we had forgotten
it until you reminded us.

We started training here to get adjusted, but ended up
enjoying the battles themselves.

This world is truly delightful. I would like to protect it
by all means.
I guess it's time, then!

Yes. We must fulfil our original mission. Contact Kunlun 
right away.
Certainly. Right away.

Human child. Your task is complete. We promise to return to
our mission.

We shall head to the meeting spot... though it pains me to
leave the Colosseum...
{next}Don't tell me you're thinking of staying?
{next}Is it that addictive?
{next}How about another battle, then?

I could use more training to adjust to this world... But,
no, that is just an excuse.

The Paradise Colosseum is a wonderful facility... But such
is the nature of warriors. Forgive me.

You like this as much as I do, do you not? Yes. Why not
enjoy it for a little longer!

I have contacted Kunlun. As expected, they told us to head for
the meeting spot.

We must obey if that is an order. Time to leave and head for
our next destination.

You're going back to report to Kunlun, right? Be sure to say
hello for us!

Please take this with you. We cannot let the winner go home
empty-handed.

Farewell, fierce human child. I am sure we shall see each
other again.
